content: headroom fields in DashboardStores/DashboardData are optional (headroomStore?: HeadroomStore | null, headroom?: HeadroomSnapshot[]) so existing tests that construct these objects without headroom don't require changes to out-of-scope test files

Dashboard status columns use visibleLength() to calculate padding from colorized text, ensuring ANSI codes don't break alignment. Pattern: pad(str, width) = str + repeat(' ', max(0, width - visibleLength(str)))

Agent statusLine (self-reported) is dimmed as secondary, taskId (auto-assigned) is accented as primary. Conditional styling: if statusLine exists use color.dim, else use accent. Pattern in renderAgentPanel line 203-206.
